use_cases: Landing page hero section with immersive product showcase experience
Portfolio or media site hero with scroll-driven parallax animations
E-commerce product grid with 3D perspective effects on scroll
ai_summary: A sophisticated parallax hero component featuring multi-row product cards with scroll-triggered 3D transforms, smooth spring animations, and perspective-based effects. Uses Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform hooks for cinematic parallax scrolling with rotateX, rotateZ, translateY, and opacity transitions. Ideal for creating immersive landing pages with dynamic product showcases.
